tagline: Slashed cost-per-acquisition by 60% while scaling spend.
description: Meridian Commerce was burning budget on underperforming Google and Meta campaigns managed by a generalist freelancer. We restructured their entire paid media operation, rebuilt campaigns from creative to bidding strategy, and achieved a 4.2× ROAS within the first full billing cycle.
challenge: Meridian's previous agency had set up broad-match campaigns with no audience segmentation, weak ad copy, and a flat bidding strategy. At a £12 CPA they couldn't afford to scale - every pound of additional spend returned diminishing results. Their product feed was also poorly structured, causing Shopping campaigns to surface irrelevant queries and waste 35% of budget on zero-intent clicks.
solution: We conducted a full account audit and rebuilt from scratch. Shopping campaigns were restructured around a tiered product priority system, separating hero SKUs from long-tail inventory. Search campaigns were restructured with tight single-theme ad groups, bespoke ad copy per intent level, and Performance Max experiments running in parallel. Audience segmentation layered first-party CRM data against Google's in-market signals. On Meta, we rebuilt the creative testing framework with a 3-2-2 structure, moving from static images to UGC-style video that outperformed brand creative by 3×.

testimonial.quote: We'd tried two agencies before growX. The difference was night and day - they understood e-commerce media buying at a technical level most generalists simply don't have.
testimonial.author: Daniel Osei
testimonial.title: Founder & CEO, Meridian Commerce
